zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabell de Brereton於1412年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓時，她的父親William Brereton23歲，母親Alice Corbet23歲。她於1436年11月5日與Sir Robert Aston在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾薩爾享年51歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabell de Brereton于1412年1月8日出生在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓时，她的父亲William Brereton23岁，母亲Alice Corbet23岁。她于1436年11月5日与Sir Robert Aston在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾薩爾享年51岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabell de Brereton was born on 8 January 1412, in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Brereton, was 23 and her mother, Alice Corbet, was 23. She married Sir Robert Aston on 5 November 1436, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1463, in Tixall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Tixall, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabell de Brereton est née le 8 janvier 1412, à Brereton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Brereton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Corbet, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Aston le 5 novembre 1436, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Tixall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Tixall, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabell de Brereton am 8. Januar 1412 in Brereton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Brereton 23 und ihre Mutter Alice Corbet 23. Sie hat am 5. November 1436 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England Sir Robert Aston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Tixall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tixall, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell de Brereton è nata il il 8 gennaio 1412 nel Brereton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Brereton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alice Corbet, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Aston il 5 novembre 1436, nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1463, nel Tixall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Tixall, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabell de Breretonが1412年1月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトンで生まれた時，父William Breretonは23歳，母Alice Corbetは23歳であった。1436年11月5日にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでSir Robert Astonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアティクサルで51歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアティクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell de Brereton(이)가 1412년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Corbet(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1436년 11월 5일 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 Sir Robert Aston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 티스알에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 티스알에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabell de Brereton nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1412, em Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Brereton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Corbet, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Aston em 5 de novembro de 1436, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabell de Brereton родилась 8 января 1412 г. в местности бриретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Brereton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Corbet, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Aston 5 ноября 1436 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности тиксалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности тиксалл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabell de Brereton nació el 8 de enero de 1412, en Brereton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Brereton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Corbet, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Aston el 5 de noviembre de 1436, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1463, en Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Tixall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
